title: The "Cyborg" Foundation
subtitle: We view neurotechnology not just as an external tool, but as the eventual, seamless extension of the human spirit.

items.title: Demystify Neural Integration
items.desc: Transition BCI from "science fiction" to a foundational life skill.

items.title: Cognitive Evolution
items.desc: Enable students to acquire skills through non-traditional, direct neural pathways (Input/Neurofeedback).

items.title: Positive Future Acceptance
items.desc: Cultivate a generation that views the "Cyborg Future" with agency, ethics, and optimism.

ethical.title: Ethical Stance
ethical.intro: Neural data is the most intimate form of personal property. Our privacy framework is uncompromising.

institutional.title: Institutional Responsibility
institutional.desc: We operate strictly B2B. The educational institution remains the legal and ethical steward of the students' neural data.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Protection
collaborative.desc: We partner with schools to create a fortified, closed-loop environment. Data never enters the commercial wild.

founder.name: David Wiehls
founder.bio: German engineer, Official China Host Partner, and Global Jury Member for the br41n.io Hackathon. An RWTH Aachen graduate dedicated to bridging the gap between pure neuroscience and applied robotics in K-12 education.
